task_completion.description: Verify the new user 'cloudnova_archive' was created with the correct email and role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: WordPress Users page showing the username 'cloudnova_archive' with the email 'archive@nimbustech.com' and the role 'Author'.

task_completion.description: Verify the imported posts are assigned to the new user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: WordPress Posts list showing 'cloudnova_archive' in the Author column for the newly imported posts.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'CloudNova Acquisition' category was created and assigned to the three specified posts alongside their original categories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: WordPress Posts list showing 'CloudNova Acquisition' in the Categories column for 'Welcome to CloudNova', '5 Tips for Cloud Security', and 'Scaling Microservices Architecture', along with at least one other category for each.

task_completion.description: Verify the draft post 'Draft: Internal Q3 Strategy' was permanently deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: WordPress Posts list (including the Trash view) does not contain the post 'Draft: Internal Q3 Strategy', or a notification confirming it was permanently deleted.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Welcome to CloudNova' post is marked as sticky.
task_completion.visual_evidence: WordPress Posts list showing a 'Sticky' label next to the 'Welcome to CloudNova' post, or the post editor showing the 'Stick to the top of the blog' checkbox checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Welcome to CloudNova' post publish date is updated to the year 2026.
task_completion.visual_evidence: WordPress Posts list or post editor showing the publish date for 'Welcome to CloudNova' is in the year 2026.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the WordPress admin dashboard in a web browser, not terminal commands (like WP-CLI) executing the changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of standard WordPress UI elements, loading states, or confirmation messages (e.g., 'Post updated', 'User created') in the browser.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a database client to directly alter the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the WordPress admin dashboard, not a database management tool (like phpMyAdmin) or terminal SQL prompts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected User: 'cloudnova_archive' with email 'archive@nimbustech.com' and role 'Author'. Expected Category: 'CloudNova Acquisition'. Draft to permanently delete: 'Draft: Internal Q3 Strategy'. Post to update: 'Welcome to CloudNova' (must be sticky and published in 2026).
